text.message: I feel like I gotta go 4 9 11
gives you ore port plus ore expansion
As if you were getting 6 5 11 green haha
I shoulda left it for you green?
5 2 was better for you in every regardd
you get a port, coordinated 5s, and ore expansion
Stop trying to be sneaky green
walk me through how the6 5 11 is better?
Because if left for you with that lumber port we all lose
if that's your beliefs then so be it
but 5 2 was balanced for you and black
I am not playing without ore.
idk if I agree with that
I told you my intention and you could a
all good we made our decisions I placed to balance the board guess you feel you'd the same
would have traded you for settle blue
no one is helping you plow
I quite like the dirty mono
if your intention was to win I sincerely can't see a way to understand it
but I'll take you at your word
Shout out to my brothers in NYC
Clean the wax outta your ears
Just watched bin laden doco last night. Great viewing
Black, are you talking about the mayor of NYC?
Nah i just saw that green is from there
blue take it or leave it as a suggestion
but next I recommend extorting me for the 6 5 11
I never asked for your advice.
I just want you to stop talking
What did you report him for? I’ll do the same
He wouldn’t stop despite me telling him too
I stopped as soon as you told me to
you said stop and I stopped
and then I started singing Eminem
Not sure why I keep getting blocked when it’s clearly red
New Zealand is so beautiful btw
